diff: Stage 2 becomes effective upon the execution of an Executive Vote implementing the activation of Stage 2. When SKY token reserves fall to approximately 15 days of remaining supply at the current distribution rate, the Core Facilitator must include the activation of Stage 2 in the next available Executive Vote, and can do so directly without a prior Governance Poll. Relevant Ecosystem Actors must take all necessary actions to cooperate with the Core Facilitator in implementing Stage 2.

Stage 2 becomes effective upon the execution of an Executive Vote implementing the activation of Stage 2.
